title: Create: Shuffle Filter
description: An unofficial forge 1.20.1 fork of agent772's Create: Shuffle Filter
body:
An unofficial forge 1.20.1 fork of agent772's Create: Shuffle Filter (https://modrinth.com/mod/create-shuffle-filter)

This is not intended to be kept up to date, rather a version that can be added to 1.20.1 modpacks 

Dependencies:
Create
